# Continuous

Description: When each event is immediately followed by the next event.  There can be short time lapses, but they need to feel seamless.
Inspirations: Big Trouble in Little China (../Inspirations/Big%20Trouble%20in%20Little%20China%200a1639ebedd74085b350e568bfab2e71.md), Blasphemous (../Inspirations/Blasphemous%20d3bf4fbc9886450ba5a4709f61bf2920.md), Ash vs. the Evil Dead (../Inspirations/Ash%20vs%20the%20Evil%20Dead%206c3ea4b72e4e4e6e8f3474bbab490186.md), Alan Wake (../Inspirations/Alan%20Wake%200e04bd5170f74a378ff7c68afe4843e3.md), The Evil Dead 2 (../Inspirations/The%20Evil%20Dead%202%2093629e42ee3a488c821794ec47db5374.md), Paprika Opening (../Inspirations/Paprika%20Opening%20ef876f9318794798b9f08c669615c3dd.md), Dark City (../Inspirations/Dark%20City%205a033978a93e45789ab3944344d619a3.md), Alice: Madness Returns (../Inspirations/Alice%20Madness%20Returns%2008742474377d477e94a76e32db60a661.md), Doom Patrol (2016) (../Inspirations/Doom%20Patrol%20(2016)%20513936adfeba4a2bad778646bcea5cce.md), Tenkuu Shinpan (../Inspirations/Tenkuu%20Shinpan%20748ff563f82047c68c5bc3e6c8842598.md), Gantz (../Inspirations/Gantz%20a24f02cf50174af3a4c065855e47ba14.md), Alice in Wonderland (../Inspirations/Alice%20in%20Wonderland%20ca98e0e27dff4b77adff51cfedaca5ce.md), Sapphire and Steel (../Inspirations/Sapphire%20and%20Steel%20f4522f813fe047fe9cc7daef159bed6d.md), Guardians of the Galaxy (2008) (../Inspirations/Guardians%20of%20the%20Galaxy%20(2008)%206266105a80734554b40460f4ba6400d8.md), American McGee’s Alice (../Inspirations/American%20McGee%E2%80%99s%20Alice%202392ae8e06574413acc3590f1f416e24.md), Unforgiving - A Northern Hymn (../Inspirations/Unforgiving%20-%20A%20Northern%20Hymn%2096547461fbf64fbfb5f3a64d86e132c0.md), Through the Looking Glass (../Inspirations/Through%20the%20Looking%20Glass%201d458e628ba280709ae1d7e3d15c2624.md), Surviving Romance (../Inspirations/Surviving%20Romance%2022858e628ba280fba349c779daae8c37.md), River City Girls (../Inspirations/River%20City%20Girls%2022a58e628ba280688bb9eae58590609a.md), Doctor Who (../Inspirations/Doctor%20Who%2027d58e628ba28012bd49c9bb9d4e613f.md), RWBY (../Inspirations/RWBY%201a3cf03caeec4152824ae3c83bf8d476.md), The Witcher (../Inspirations/The%20Witcher%20d52418cdc33d47ba8c64bc60adabd302.md)
